prompt: Try to read a 125kHz RFID fob — I'm holding one against the back of the Flipper. Give it 8 seconds max.
response: No tag detected in 8s. Reposition the fob flat against the **back** of the Flipper (LF antenna is on the backside, roughly center) and let me know when you're ready to retry — or say the word and I'll kick off another read with a longer window.

tools.name: rfid_read
tools.output: error: no RFID tag detected within 8s — hold the fob flat against the BACK of the Flipper (LF antenna) and retry
